cn_title: 《PlayStation》索尼2026年外设三连发：摇杆、显示器、音箱上手
subtitle: 不差钱
opus_summary: IGN近日受邀前往PlayStation总部，提前体验了索尼2026年三款全新外设：FlexStrike无线格斗摇杆、PlayStation 27寸游戏显示器以及Pulse Elevate无线音箱。FlexStrike售价199.99美元(约合人民币1430元)，支持无线/有线双模，设计轻便且兼容PC；显示器内置DualSense充电挂钩，1440p/240Hz，售价349.99美元(约合人民币2500元)；Pulse Elevate音箱采用PlayStation Link低延迟无线技术，内置AI降噪麦克风，音质出色，售价待定。三款产品分别将于8月6日、8月27日及待定日期发售，预购即将开启。

paragraphs.en: PlayStation has a crop of new hardware launching in 2026. No, unfortunately I don’t have anything to tell you about the PS6, but I recently had the chance to visit PlayStation HQ and go hands-on with a slate of upcoming PlayStation accessories, the FlexStrike wireless fightstick , the Pulse Elevate wireless speakers , and the first official PlayStation-branded gaming monitor .
paragraphs.cn: PlayStation在2026年有一批新硬件即将推出。不，很遗憾我没有任何关于PS6的消息可以透露，但我最近有机会造访PlayStation总部，亲手体验了一系列即将推出的PlayStation外设：FlexStrike无线格斗摇杆、Pulse Elevate无线音箱，以及首款官方PlayStation品牌游戏显示器。

paragraphs.en: Let’s dive right in with the FlexStrike wireless fight stick. Now, I’ll say right off the bat that I’m not a hardcore fighting game enthusiast, but that’s actually the kind of person that PlayStation is targeting with the FlexStrike. Sony reps told me that they built the FlexStrike for the kind of player who is interested in leveling up their fighting game experience and graduating from playing with a DualSense controller , as opposed to people who already have a favorite fightstick.
paragraphs.cn: 我们先从FlexStrike无线格斗摇杆说起。首先我要声明，我并不是硬核格斗游戏爱好者，但这恰恰是PlayStation推出FlexStrike所瞄准的用户群体。索尼代表告诉我，他们打造FlexStrike是为了那些想要提升格斗游戏体验、从DualSense手柄操作进阶的玩家，而不是那些已经拥有心仪格斗摇杆的老手。

paragraphs.en: That makes a lot of sense, because “wireless” is practically sacrilege when it comes to FGC enthusiasts. Now before you freak out, let me make it clear that the FlexStrike can be used with an optional wired connection, but being able to play wireless adds a nice bit of freedom for gamers who are just playing at home on the couch and don’t necessarily need the absolute tip-top speeds of a wired connection. Even so, wireless is handled via a PlayStation Link dongle that can support two FlexStrikes at once, and there was no perceptible latency during my hands-on.
paragraphs.cn: 这很有道理，因为对于格斗游戏社区（FGC）的狂热爱好者来说，「无线」几乎是一种亵渎。在你抓狂之前，我要说明一下，FlexStrike可以通过有线连接使用，但无线游玩为那些只是在家坐在沙发上玩、并不一定需要有线连接极致速度的玩家增添了一份自由。即便如此，无线连接是通过一个PlayStation Link适配器实现的，它可以同时支持两个FlexStrike，而且在我上手体验期间，没有感觉到任何可察觉的延迟。

paragraphs.en: This ethos carries through to the design of the FlexStrike as well. It has the same black and white color palette and sleek, futuristic look as the PS5 and DualSense controller. It’s also lightweight and fairly thin compared to the handful of fightsticks that I’ve used in the past. This is not a bulky box – it feels more like a MacBook sitting on your lap, with a nice textured grip pad on the bottom and a comfortable slope to the button pad area that aids in ergonomics.
paragraphs.cn: 这种理念也贯穿了FlexStrike的设计。它采用了与PS5和DualSense手柄相同的黑白配色和流畅的未来主义外观。与我过去用过的几款格斗摇杆相比，它也更轻、更薄。这不是一个笨重的盒子——它放在腿上感觉更像一台MacBook，底部有舒适的纹理防滑垫，按键区域有一个符合人体工学的舒适倾斜角度。

paragraphs.en: The buttons use proprietary mechanical switches, but they don’t have much of an audible click when pressed. The stick on the other hand has a satisfying audible click when actuated. The balltop is unscrewable for folks who want to use a different topper, while the underside of the FlexStrike has an interchangeable restrictor gate that lets you swap between a square, octagon, and circle. We weren’t allowed to film this bottom section, but the FlexStrike’s bottom panel hinges open and has spots underneath to store the spare restrictor gates as well as the PlayStation Link USB dongle.
paragraphs.cn: 按键采用了定制的机械开关，但按下时没有明显的咔嗒声。摇杆在拨动时则有令人满意的清脆响声。球形摇杆头可以拧下来，方便想要更换不同摇杆头的玩家，而FlexStrike的底部则有一个可更换的挡圈，让你可以在方形、八角和圆形之间切换。我们不被允许拍摄底部区域，但FlexStrike的底板可以铰链式打开，下面有存放备用挡圈和PlayStation Link USB适配器的位置。

paragraphs.en: The FlexStrike can fully function as a standard PS5 controller – though good luck playing Elden Ring with it – up top are all your traditional menu buttons, a touchpad, and a switch that swaps the stick between controlling left and right thumbstick inputs or the D-Pad. There’s also a lock button that sets the controller to tournament mode and prevents you from accidentally pausing or opening the menu during a match.
paragraphs.cn: FlexStrike可以完全当作标准PS5手柄使用——不过祝你好运用它玩《艾尔登法环》——顶部有所有传统的菜单按键、一个触摸板，以及一个开关，可以在摇杆控制左右摇杆输入和方向键之间切换。还有一个锁定按钮，可以将手柄设置为比赛模式，防止你在比赛中意外暂停或打开菜单。

paragraphs.en: And, bonus, the FlexStrike comes with a padded carrying case that can be configured as a backpack or sling bag. The case has storage areas for the included USB cable, as well as a nice padded well to protect the stick.
paragraphs.cn: 另外，FlexStrike还附带一个带衬垫的便携包，可以配置成背包或斜挎包。包内有存放附赠USB线的区域，还有一个很好的衬垫凹槽来保护摇杆。

paragraphs.en: All told it’s an attractive fightstick that I think perfectly achieves the aim PlayStation is going for. I’m not enough of a fighting game authority to weigh in if the FlexStrike will sway enthusiasts away from their current favorite fightstick, but for those who are looking to move up from playing on controller, it’s a compelling option. That’s doubly true if you’re primarily a PS5 player – the FlexStrike is compatible with PC as well – both wired and wirelessly – but its PlayStation aesthetic makes it a natural choice for gamers in Sony’s ecosystem. Critically, it achieves this goal without sacrificing on high-end features that would make it incompatible with hardcore FGC players.
paragraphs.cn: 总而言之，这是一款很有吸引力的格斗摇杆，我认为它完美地实现了PlayStation的目标。我算不上格斗游戏权威，无法评判FlexStrike是否会让硬核玩家放弃他们目前心爱的摇杆，但对于那些想从手柄操作升级的玩家来说，它是一个很有吸引力的选择。如果你主要是PS5玩家，那就更是如此——FlexStrike也兼容PC，无论有线还是无线——但它的PlayStation美学设计使其成为索尼生态系统中玩家的自然之选。关键在于，它在实现这一目标的同时，并没有牺牲那些会让硬核FGC玩家觉得不兼容的高端功能。

paragraphs.en: The FlexStrike launches on August 6, the same day as Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls , for $199.99. Pre-orders begin on June 12.
paragraphs.cn: FlexStrike将于8月6日发售，与《Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls》同日上市，售价199.99美元(约合人民币1430元)。预购将于6月12日开始。

paragraphs.en: Up next we have the first gaming monitor built specifically for use with the PS5. As a game console, most people associate the PS5 with a TV and couch type living room setup, but it also works great paired with a gaming monitor at a desk. That’s where the PlayStation 27” Gaming Monitor comes in. It’s fairly run-of-the-mill as far as gaming monitors go: it has a 1440p resolution IPS display with a 240hz refresh rate and support for HDR and VRR. What makes it interesting is a built-in charging hook where you can stow a DualSense controller.
paragraphs.cn: 接下来是首款专为PS5使用而打造的游戏显示器。作为一款游戏主机，大多数人会将PS5与电视和客厅沙发环境联系起来，但它搭配桌面游戏显示器使用效果也很好。这就是PlayStation 27寸游戏显示器的用武之地。就游戏显示器而言，它相当常规：采用1440p分辨率IPS面板，240Hz刷新率，支持HDR和VRR。让它有趣的是内置的充电挂钩，你可以把DualSense手柄挂在上面。

paragraphs.en: I do the majority of my gaming from my desk, both with controller and mouse and keyboard, and my controller floated nebulously on my desk until I invested in a charging dock and gave it a proper home. The charging hook solves that problem while also freeing up desk space, making it an easy recommendation for anyone looking to build a PS5 desk setup. Conveniently, the hook can fold up behind the monitor if you want it out of the way when not in use.
paragraphs.cn: 我大部分游戏时间都在书桌前，用手柄和键鼠，我的手柄之前一直飘忽不定地放在桌上，直到我买了个充电底座，给它找了个固定的家。这个充电挂钩解决了这个问题，同时还能腾出桌面空间，对于任何想要搭建PS5桌面环境的人来说，都很容易推荐。方便的是，挂钩在不使用时可以折叠到显示器后面，不碍事。

paragraphs.en: Beyond the charging hook, another PS5-minded design choice is the inclusion of two HDMI 2.1 ports in addition to a DisplayPort 1.4 input. PS5 uses HDMI, while most modern graphics cards offer both HDMI and DisplayPort. This means you can connect the monitor to both your PS5 and PC via HDMI if you want, instead of limiting your PC to the DisplayPort connection.
paragraphs.cn: 除了充电挂钩，另一个为PS5考虑的设计选择是，除了一个DisplayPort 1.4输入外，还配备了两个HDMI 2.1接口。PS5使用HDMI，而大多数现代显卡同时提供HDMI和DisplayPort。这意味着你可以通过HDMI将显示器同时连接到PS5和PC，而不必将PC限制在DisplayPort连接上。

paragraphs.en: Spec-wise, the monitor is nothing special, but it’s worth noting that the specs do match the PS5 well. While most TVs these days run at 4K, the PS5 is perfectly capable of outputting at 1440p – and in fact doing so means that you can more easily hit higher framerates, even while prioritizing image quality. It’s worth noting that while the monitor is capable of up to a 240hz refresh rate, that’s only for PC. The PS5 itself caps out at 120hz.
paragraphs.cn: 规格方面，这款显示器没什么特别的，但值得注意的是，这些规格确实与PS5很匹配。虽然现在大多数电视都是4K分辨率，但PS5完全能够输出1440p——事实上，这样做意味着你可以更容易地达到更高的帧率，即使在优先考虑画质的情况下也是如此。值得注意的是，虽然显示器最高支持240Hz刷新率，但这仅适用于PC。PS5本身最高支持120Hz。

paragraphs.en: That said, the specs found in the PlayStation monitor will typically run you around $200, while this is priced at $349.99. There’s definitely a unique benefit to the built-in charging hook, and doubly so if you want a monitor that aesthetically matches the PS5. Just know that you’re paying a bit of premium for those unique features. The monitor will launch on August 27, with pre-orders starting on June 5.
paragraphs.cn: 话虽如此，PlayStation显示器所具备的规格通常售价在200美元(约合人民币1430元)左右，而这款定价为349.99美元(约合人民币2500元)。内置充电挂钩无疑有独特的优势，如果你想要一款在外观上与PS5相匹配的显示器，那就更是如此。只是要知道，你为这些独特功能支付了一点溢价。这款显示器将于8月27日发售，预购从6月5日开始。

paragraphs.en: The final stop on our hardware tour is the upcoming Pulse Elevate wireless speakers. PlayStation told me the goal for these was to provide the sound quality and features of using a gaming headset , but without, well, the headset. The Pulse Elevate have a few tricks to achieve that goal.
paragraphs.cn: 我们硬件之旅的最后一站是即将推出的Pulse Elevate无线音箱。PlayStation告诉我，其目标是提供使用游戏耳机时的音质和功能，但又不用戴耳机。Pulse Elevate有一些巧思来实现这一目标。

paragraphs.en: Like the recent Pulse Elite headset and Pulse Explore earbuds , the Pulse Elevate speakers use PlayStation Link, Sony’s proprietary low-latency lossless wireless audio tech. While the speakers appear to be wired at first glance, the cord actually only connects to their charging puck, which the speakers sit atop via a cute nesting design. This means that you can easily reposition the speakers if their ideal sound position isn’t a place where you want them sitting all the time.
paragraphs.cn: 与最近的Pulse Elite耳机和Pulse Explore耳塞一样，Pulse Elevate音箱采用了PlayStation Link，这是索尼专有的低延迟无损无线音频技术。虽然乍看之下音箱像是有线连接，但那根线实际上只连接到它们的充电底座，音箱通过一个可爱的嵌套设计放置在底座上。这意味着，如果理想的听音位置不是你希望音箱一直摆放的地方，你可以轻松地重新摆放它们。

paragraphs.en: The speakers have planar magnetic drivers and a built-in woofer to provide powerful sound across the audio spectrum. I played a few minutes of Ghost of Yotei and Saros, and was impressed by both the volume and clarity the speakers were capable of. Directional audio was also not a problem – they have PlayStation’s tempest 3D audio tech built in, and I had no problem hearing directional audio cues in Saros, just as if I was wearing a gaming headset.
paragraphs.cn: 音箱采用平面磁驱动单元和内置低音炮，可在整个音频频谱中提供强劲的声音。我试玩了几分钟《羊蹄山之魂》和《沙罗周期》，音箱的音量和清晰度都让我印象深刻。方向性音频也不是问题——它们内置了PlayStation的Tempest 3D音频技术，我在《沙罗周期》中听到方向性音频提示毫无问题，就像戴着游戏耳机一样。

paragraphs.en: Beyond sound output, the Pulse Elevate also have a built-in microphone and can function as a mic for voice chat and phone calls. Critically, the speakers have an AI-enhanced noise rejection system that helps pick up your voice even while music or game audio is blaring loudly. In my demo, a PlayStation rep recorded a sound clip while music was playing so loudly that I could barely hear what he said, and when we listened back the audio was crisp and clear, with no evidence that music had been playing while it was recorded. Seriously impressive stuff.
paragraphs.cn: 除了声音输出，Pulse Elevate还内置麦克风，可以用作语音聊天和电话通话的麦克风。关键是，音箱配备了AI增强降噪系统，即使在音乐或游戏音频大声播放时，也能帮助拾取你的声音。在我的演示中，一位PlayStation代表在音乐声大到几乎听不清他说话的情况下录制了一段音频，当我们回放时，声音清脆清晰，完全没有录制时正在播放音乐的痕迹。真的令人印象深刻。

paragraphs.en: The Pulse Elevate speakers will come in black and white colorways, but pricing and release date are yet to be announced.
paragraphs.cn: Pulse Elevate音箱将有黑白两种配色，但售价和发售日期尚未公布。
